message:
chore(meta): sync beads issue tracker and audit index

- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest closed audit and peer-review
  issues (TCP trait readiness, Unix listener concurrent accept wakeups,
  Redis pool desync, WebSocket cancel-safety, rate limiter ID exhaustion)
- Append new entries to audit_index.jsonl for recently audited files

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
